_comment: Project config for generate_report.py. Use {build} as a placeholder for the build name passed on the CLI.

credentials._comment: Env var names only — actual values belong in the environment, never in this file. Run --check-credentials to validate before a pipeline run.
credentials.JIRA_API_TOKEN: JIRA service-account API token (base64 email:token for Cloud, Bearer for Server)
credentials.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: Anthropic API key for AI analysis phase

mysql._note: Full data source — always collects failures (test_runs) and performance (performance_metrics). Load fixture: mysql < examples/fixtures/mysql_schema.sql

clickhouse._note: Full data source — always collects failures (test_runs) and performance (performance_metrics). Load fixture: clickhouse-client --multiquery < examples/fixtures/clickhouse_schema.sql

jira._note: Set JIRA_API_TOKEN env var before using --jira

ai._note: Set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env var before using --ai
